・If you become friends with someone via a group hunt/scanning their QR code and hunting with them, this info related to how you met them will be displayed in the friend request confirmation screen.
・Your style customization progress has been made easier to understand in the equipment details screen.

title: Magic Chess: Go Go
notes:
1. New feature Magic Auction is live! Your auction legend begins now!
2. New Commander Freya makes her debut! Explore the new patch to get Freya, new Battle Emotes, and other rewards for free!
3. The highly anticipated alliance battle mode is officially live! Team up with others and experience the thrill of team fights!
4. Premium skin Chou "Northern Fist" is now live! Ling "Serene Plume" also makes a return!
5. Lantern Wish is now live! Participate to get Zilong "Summer Waves"!

title: mo.co
notes:
● Weapon Mastery is here! Every weapon now has its own progression path. Earn stars in Elite contracts with the weapon, clear Dojo Challenges, and hit other weapon Milestones to unlock rewards — including a Golden variant of the Weapon Skins, a unique title, and of course - mo.gold.
● Daily Goal Streaks! Hit your daily goals day af ter day to build a streak and unlock double rewards!
● Elite Hunter improvements — More clarity on what the track is and a cleaner screen for each time you upgrade yo
